class.name: GDK
class.brief_description: Root singleton for Microsoft GDK integration.
class.description: GDK is the engine singleton that provides access to Microsoft GDK runtime services including users, game UI, accessibility, achievements, package metadata/content access, stats, leaderboards, privacy, presence, social, store commerce, profile, string verification, Title Storage, error reporting, launcher, multiplayer activity, capture, system/runtime metadata, display (HDR/timeout deferral), and game activation events. Access via [code]GDK[/code] in GDScript after the extension loads. Call [method initialize] to start the runtime. By default the addon pumps completions automatically each process frame through [code]gdk/runtime/embed_dispatch[/code]; call [method dispatch] manually when that setting is disabled or when you need deterministic control.

method.name: initialize
method.description: Initializes the GDK runtime. Optionally pass a configuration Variant. Returns a [GDKResult] indicating success or failure.

method.name: shutdown
method.description: Shuts down the GDK runtime and releases all resources.

method.name: is_available
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the GDK runtime is available on the current platform.

method.name: is_initialized
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] if the GDK runtime has been successfully initialized.

method.name: dispatch
method.description: Manually pumps the GDK async task queue and manager-driven state. Use this when [code]gdk/runtime/embed_dispatch[/code] is disabled or when you want deterministic control over completion timing. Returns the number of tasks dispatched.

method.name: get_users
method.description: Returns the [GDKUsers] service for managing Xbox user sign-in and identity.

method.name: get_game_ui
method.description: Returns the [GDKGameUI] service for PC-supported system UI flows.

method.name: get_achievements
method.description: Returns the [GDKAchievements] service for querying and updating Xbox achievements.

method.name: get_package
method.description: Returns the [GDKPackage] service for package enumeration, package mounts, and resource-pack loading helpers.

method.name: get_stats
method.description: Returns the [GDKStats] service for querying, staging, flushing, tracking, and caching Xbox Services user statistics.

method.name: get_leaderboards
method.description: Returns the [GDKLeaderboards] service for Xbox Services leaderboard queries and pagination.

method.name: get_privacy
method.description: Returns the [GDKPrivacy] service for Xbox Services privacy permission checks and avoid/mute list queries.

method.name: get_accessibility
method.description: Returns the [GDKAccessibility] service for concrete PC accessibility APIs.

method.name: get_presence
method.description: Returns the GDKPresence service for managing rich presence.

method.name: get_social
method.description: Returns the GDKSocial service for social features.

method.name: get_store
method.description: Returns the GDKStore service for XStore commerce operations.

method.name: get_profile
method.description: Returns the [GDKProfile] service for Xbox Services profile lookups.

method.name: get_string_verify
method.description: Returns the [GDKStringVerify] service for Xbox Services text verification.

method.name: get_title_storage
method.description: Returns the [GDKTitleStorage] service for Xbox Services Title Storage.

method.name: get_error_reporting
method.description: Returns the [GDKErrorReporting] service for [code]XError[/code] callback and option configuration.

method.name: get_launcher
method.description: Returns the [GDKLauncher] service for supported URI launch flows on PC GDK.

method.name: get_multiplayer_activity
method.description: Returns the GDKMultiplayerActivity service for multiplayer activity management.

method.name: get_capture
method.description: Returns the [GDKCapture] service for capture metadata and capture-state management.

method.name: get_system
method.description: Returns the GDKSystem service for title/runtime metadata and environment facts.

method.name: get_display
method.description: Returns the [GDKDisplay] service for HDR mode probing/enable and idle display-timeout deferrals.

method.name: get_activation
method.description: Returns the [GDKActivation] service for game activation events (protocol/file/invite launches).

members.member: The [GDKUsers] service instance for managing Xbox user sign-in and identity.
The [GDKGameUI] service instance for PC-supported system UI flows.
The [GDKAchievements] service instance for querying and updating Xbox achievements.
The [GDKPackage] service instance for package enumeration, package mounts, and resource-pack loading helpers.
The [GDKStats] service instance for Xbox Services user statistics.
The [GDKLeaderboards] service instance for Xbox Services leaderboard queries.
The [GDKPrivacy] service instance for Xbox Services privacy checks and lists.
The [GDKAccessibility] service instance for accessibility APIs.
The GDKPresence service instance for managing rich presence.
The GDKSocial service instance for social features.
The GDKStore service instance for XStore commerce operations.
The [GDKProfile] service instance for Xbox Services profile lookups.
The [GDKStringVerify] service instance for Xbox Services text verification.
The [GDKTitleStorage] service instance for Xbox Services Title Storage.
The [GDKErrorReporting] service instance for [code]XError[/code] callback and option configuration.
The [GDKLauncher] service instance for supported URI launch flows on PC GDK.
The GDKMultiplayerActivity service instance for multiplayer activity management.
The [GDKCapture] service instance for capture metadata and capture-state management.
The GDKSystem service instance for title/runtime metadata and environment facts.
The [GDKDisplay] service instance for HDR mode probing/enable and idle display-timeout deferrals.
The [GDKActivation] service instance for game activation events (protocol/file/invite launches).

signal.name: initialized
signal.description: Emitted when the GDK runtime has been successfully initialized.

signal.name: shutdown_completed
signal.description: Emitted when the GDK runtime has completed shutdown.

signal.name: runtime_error
signal.description: Emitted when an [code]XError[/code] runtime error is reported by the GDK error-reporting bridge. After the result-only refactor, this root signal is reserved for unsolicited X-error events; per-service async failures are surfaced on the service's own [code]runtime_error[/code] signal (for example [code]GDK.social.runtime_error[/code], [code]GDK.achievements.runtime_error[/code]).
